entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.2
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2

entry.title: Feeding Frenzy 2 v0.6
entry.content: ## Quick Patch * Fix for fullscreen where some user's setups used negative coordinates * Logic fix: accessing level 58 requires dash

entry.title: Wargroove 2 v1.1.7
entry.content: # Features - New map by KoiiBlitz: Giant Issue

entry.title: burger_shop v0.2.0
entry.content:
Added support for Burger Shop 2! The setup process is similar to Burger Shop 1 and the associated files include "Burger Shop 2" in the name.
### Burger Shop 1 See the [setup guide](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop/docs/setup_en.md) for full installation and connection instructions. See [this page](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop/docs/en_Burger%20Shop.md) for details on what is randomized.
### Burger Shop 2 See the [setup guide](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop_2/docs/setup_en.md) for full installation and connection instructions. See [this page](https://github.com/zsiegel701/Archipelago/blob/burger-shop/worlds/burger_shop_2/docs/en_Burger%20Shop%202.md) for details on what is randomized.
### Additional Changes - Removed the "user_" prefix when logging that a file was found. - Only update the level count when an Archipelago save file is detected to prevent messing with existing save files.

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.0
entry.content:
# New Features * New Goal Option: Medals * When enabled, Pokédex Medals are added to the item pool, and receiving a certain amount of them is required for goal * Goal Trigger * Choose when goal should be checked, either at end of ball or after defeating Groudon/Kyogre/Rayquaza * `/check_goal` Quickly check goal progress * A message will now appear in-game when items are received from other players. * A message will now appear in-game when goal is completed. * Egg Bunches 1-4 have been replaced with the following: * Egg Bunch (Forest): Wurmple, Ralts, Oddish * Egg Bunch (Cave): Whismur, Aron, Zubat, Bagon * Egg Bunch (Mountain): Spoink, Shuppet, Chimecho, Natu * Egg Bunch (Desert): Sandshrew, Spinda, Trapinch, Phanpy * Egg Bunch (Sea): Snorunt, Spheal, Corsola, Horsea
# Bug Fixes * Pichu can now be DexNav'd with less than 100 Pokémon registered. * Fixed Special Guest dex entries being offset by 1 * Fixed attract mode incrementing counters for ball upgrades/bumpers * Fixed being able to activate e-Reader cards without actually owning the e-Reader cards * Fixed Clamperl requiring a Fire Stone for evolution, rather than a Link Cable

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix(transport-rando): never shuffle the Itorash capsule rides (Hanubia/Raven Beak crash) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/133 * Repair PopTracker logic export: rebuild compiled_rules.json from the graph by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/134
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.15.0...v0.16.0

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix: Dread client not connecting — re-assert bridge sysmodule + Bridge IP override by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/135
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.16.0...v0.17.0

entry.title: burger_shop v0.2.1
entry.content: - Removed "Peas and Carrots" which will now be unlocked by receiving "Peas" and "Carrots" individually. This avoids the issue of having too many items in the item pool when the maximum number of items are generated.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, Mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, In familiar spots or shuffled flow!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, Like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0
entry.content:
### New Option: - Life count checks can now be set using both a range and custom values - Useful if you want to add a lot of life count checks
### Bug Fixes: - Fixed typos causing 3 life sanity checks to not be placed by the apworld - This also fixes the life sanity checks after Bee-Having being off by 1 ID - Fixed the client crashing when no life count checks are enabled - Fixed life bundles not sending when fruit sanity is enabled
### Known Issues: - Generating a multiworld with multiple Crash 2 yamls will error if any life count checks are enabled - Life sanity lives are no longer perma-collected - Also everything mentioned in v0.4.0 known issues

entry.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v1.0.0
entry.content: "I'm happy with the state of the APWorld" kind of update # Changes * New options to allow unlocking `Progressive Vehicle` items other than multiworld items * Via Banana Bird count * Via worlds unlocked * Swanky's Sideshow games can be valid locations (beat each 3 per world) * This also removes the bear coin cost to enter a game * KONG letters progress is saved per level upon collecting them * Bear Brothers' trade sequence can be shuffled * Adds 3 locations to the Banana Bird as locations option * Removes giving Barnacle a shell as a requirement for the rare flower to appear on the map * Rare flower no longer checks for Razor Ridge completion, only Barbos * Mirror item in Bazaar expects you to reach either Cove or Mekanos to consider it in logic (no one wants to farm coins) * Added a label to every world that informs what's the current progress on level clears and how many are required to fight the world's boss * Added an option to swap Kaos Kore and Knautilus levels * Goal option is updated to reflect that the goal is now either Kastle KAOS or Knautilus instead of KAOS Kore or Krematoa * Implemented more `cog_placement` options: * `krematoa_level_clear`: Places them at level ends in Krematoa * `krematoa_anywhere`: Places them anywhere in Krematoa. Includes Extra Cogs. * Added an option to have additional Banana Birds, Cogs and Bonus Coins in the item pool * Added the ability to change the Kongs' palettes * Generator no longer places Cogs if Knautilus isn't a valid goal * Allow setting to 0 the required level clears per world * Fixed an issue with levels on Krematoa trying to get alternate palettes after Knautilus surfaces * Level ID is now sent via Data Storage (for PopTracker auto tabbing) * A few logic changes

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.8a0
entry.content:
compatible with seeds generated in v7.x
## New Features - Added Rule Builder Logic support for AP 0.6.7+. Main benefit is that you can use the UT command /explain to see the logic for a particular location or region. Also speeds up gen slightly and is easier to work with, and allows for exporting logic for potential future tracker stuff! - Added /carrot_asked command that prints the debug output from the current room, even if not running debug launcher ## Bugfixes - Fixed typo in flags for s Mayscore portal to ocean portal with portal unlock items - Fixed snow tracks grouping typo - Tweaked respawns in Staven's room - Added detection and error message for trying to play with rom version 1.1 - Allowed picking up teacher with fire glyph - Fixed total rabbits not sending properly - Added a hitbox to Hyrule Castle 2f indoor chest - Entering the ToS 31F no longer steals your tears of light - An Evil Train now always spawns underwater - Fixed model swap for Bunnio's Rabbit net - Made sure you can pick up Joe in outset after already taking him to Beedle - Added delay reset to rabbit rewards - Stopped Kenzo from leaving tp early if visited Anouki - Fixed a Kenzo bug in AV - Changed some trading post event logic - Treasure removed by delay reset now removes itself properly - Tears now reload on all ToS floors that don't remove them, allowing you to grab a new phantom after entering glyph rooms. - Going north on W Wooded Temple Tracks without snow glyph now bounces you cause there are no tracks - Buying bombs/quivers from shops no longer sends their matching ammo location. Also fixed for if those locs are their vanilla items - Saving and quitting in Staven's room now puts you in the room before, preventing a softlock from Zelda despawning during the fight. - Fixed some faulty goals, Including Staven, Vulcano and Skeldritch - Expanded hitbox for rabbit haven island chest - Fixed bad address on fire realm ice crash fix - Added killing the marine temple snapper Without sword to hard logic (requires setting up a hit before entering the arena with boomerang or bombs) - Added getting wooded temple boss key without whirlwind to hard logic - Fixed some shop detection in Goron shop - Fixed Snurglar keys sometimes sending multiple locations - Fixed Ocean Source persisting after Cactops - Made sure goal dungeons are always in the required dungeon pool, even when required dungeons are 0
Known Issues: - There are still some occasional fill bugs I've been struggling to track down

entry.title: PokePark v1.2.3
entry.content:
## What's Changed * bugfix: changed Groudon Location region to magma zone by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/124
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.3
entry.content:
## DLC Has **no** logic and is not included yet - Enable teleportation from DLC areas before DLC final boss is defeated
## Change log
- Popup options moved into the Mod and can toggled on and off from the randomizer menu - Shops revert and currently sell their items for 3x the original prices - Received Archipelago item counter is saved even when a disconnect happens - Arcade rewards fixed - Mia shop item missing fixed - Cloister - Crouching Bunny -> missing jump height - Ian Sho Bonus 15 to 18 -> bad logic fixed - Verglas Village to Snowveil -> slide included - Dreamless Depths to Dream palace -> missing bombs - DreamKeeper - MP Quicken: Sugar Rush -> missing slide - DreamKeeper - Alius fight -> removed bomb requirement - DreamKeeper - Grip Sole Boots -> removed bomb requirement - CopperWood to Industry -> missing connection added

entry.title: spyro3gba v3.post0
entry.content: Only writes to inventory/server when something happens as opposed to always.

entry.title: Civilization V v0.10.4
entry.content:
**Changes/Improvements**: - Sending an item now also sends an alert to the player with the item sent.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1313e/Civ-V-AP-World/compare/v0.10.3...v0.10.4

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.3
entry.content:
This release changes from Science Mode to career mode and adds contract
See the discord for more details on what is new here
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.2...v0.6.3

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix(patcher): re-assert rom:/ap_config.json on auto-patch by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/137
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.17.0...v0.17.1

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.1
entry.content: - Fixes to BITFS logic. - Renames a PSS 1-Up location name.

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.1
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fixed Armaldo logically evolving from Cradily and not Anorith.

entry.title: Divinity Original Sin 2 v0.5.0
entry.content:
New: - Exp has been removed - Source masters can no longer give source points - Logic has been reworked accordingly
You will now only be able to level up and increase your maximum amount of source points by obtaining AP items. This is to facilitate better logic as well as reliance on other AP games.
Changes: - Grebb the Scholar has been removed as a check (its not even a quest in DE, whoops)
Bugfixes: - Hired henchmen now work properly in regards to deathlink and stat increasing items - Multiplayer custom characters work properly in regards to deathlink and stat increasing items
Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)
DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.4
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.3...v0.6.4

entry.title: Valheim v0.2.1
entry.content: Added additional logic requirements to force a minimum level of equipment to be available to the player as the seed progresses. Fixed Forest Troll trophy.

entry.title: Age Of Mythology Retold v1.3.5
entry.content:
## Generation Improvements - ⚙️ Generation used to get upset for edge cases which is smoother now. One of these is vanilla gods + NA campaign. - ⚖️ Better point requirement generation so lofty scenarios are still doable.
### 👍 Fully compatible with current games v1.1+
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.3.4...v1.3.5

entry.title: Celeste (Open World) v1.1.1
entry.content:
v1.1.1 of the Archipelago Open World mod and APWorld for Celeste.
Mod is fully backwards-compatible with seeds generated with v1.0.x APWorlds.
Changelog since v1.0.7:
``` ### Features:
- New Goal - Poetry Slam - Collect all 16 Crystal Hearts and assemble the poem in the correct order to finish - New Items - Yellow Torches - `Torches` have been renamed to `Blue Torches` - Tiny Trap - Logic Difficulty option - Developer Intended - Vanilla Movement - Assist Mode - Move Shuffle options - Dash Shuffle - Unified - Cardinal Loose - Cardinal Restrictive - Octal - Climb Shuffle - Crouch Shuffle - Split Interactables option - Separate Interactable Items per Level, per Side, or per Level and Side - Golden Amnesty option - Select how many deaths it takes for a full reset with a Golden Strawberry - DeathLink Receipt Style option - Death - Restart Chapter - Reduce Raspberries option - Reduces the number of Raspberry items in the pool - Torch Behavior option - Determines how torches behave (if you have the relevant item) - Custom Strawberry sprites by @Sterlia - Per-level deaths are now saved between play sessions - YAMLless Universal Tracker support - Swap to RuleBuilder for logic rules ```

entry.title: burger_shop v0.2.2
entry.content:
- Removed extra recipes from being added to the item pool when starter recipes are enabled - Added extra handling for profile names containing non-standard characters
Only the .apworld files are changed in this release

entry.title: FF1 Pixel Remaster v0.6.0
entry.content: - Fix event scripts hanging after receiving the ship on overworld

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 2 v0.6.4.5
entry.content:
Testing Dynamic PINE ports for multi PCSX2 instance support. Also adds auto connection functionally to the client using patch data, and added the manifest json. Based on: https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/releases/tag/v0.6.4 v0.6.4.4: Now has UT integrated, and yaml-less support. Works as long as [UT](<https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases?q=tracker_&expanded=true>) is installed. Also fixed some first person logic issues. Thanks to @AmondoVagyok Also added world version to slot data so can see if client isn't matching multiworld gen. Planned: More UT features. "Glitch" logic. Internal or external map. Auto map tab switching. Community suggested logic changes. v0.6.4.5: Fixed CRC not being forced to 8 characters. Also made apworld version be checked using the archipelago.json instead of manually set.
### Setup You need every RaC2 option in your `host.yaml` setup. That means: `iso_file` to a valid vanilla iso in your Archipelago directory (should be already from normal setup) `iso_start` to your PCSX2 exe (Make sure to use `/`) `game_ini` to a game settings file in your PCSX2's gamesettings folder. (Usually `%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini`)
Example: ```yaml rac2_options: # File name of the Ratchet & Clank 2 ISO iso_file: "Ratchet & Clank - Going Commando (USA) (v1.01).iso" # Set this false to never autostart an iso (such as after patching), # Set it to true to have the operating system default program open the iso # Alternatively, set it to a path to a program to open the .iso file with (like PCSX2) iso_start: "C:/Emulators/(PS2) PCSX2/pcsx2-qt.exe" # Set to file path to an existing PCSX2 game setting INI file to have the patcher # create an appropriately named INI with the rest of the patch output. This can be used to # allow you to use you own custom PCSX2 setting with patched ISO. game_ini: "%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini" ```
Game settings ini example: ```ini [EmuCore] EnablePINE = true PINESlot = 28011
[Achievements] Enabled = false
[MemoryCards] Slot1_Enable = true Slot2_Enable = false Slot1_Filename = APgames.ps2 ``` Recommended you use your settings for vanilla RaC2. But you can make a copy with specific edits. So you can set an AP specific memory card like in the example above. (You don't need to add PINE settings)
For normal setup if you haven't already. Check [GitHub](<https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md>), and [Discord](<https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1325015730218860554/1371288772548755466>). Also [World info & FaQ](https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/blob/main/README.md).
### Start Simply run a `.aprac2` file with Archipelago. (Recommended to set to open `.aprac2` files with Archipelago by default) Or run the client, and use the `/start` command, and then select your desired `.aprac2` file. (Or drag `.aprac2` into the client) Note: You can rename `aprac2` and patched `iso` but they have to have the same name or it'll make another `iso`. (Same way you have to keep `.apsave`, and their `.zip` name the same if hosting locally)
Changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/v0.6.4.4...v0.6.4.5?w=1> Full changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/main...v0.6.4.5?w=1>
# Supported Game Version This only works with the following version of the game for now: - Platform: ``Playstation 2`` (This project will not be tackling the Playstation 3 versions) - Version: ``1.01`` - Serial: ``SCUS-97268`` - CRC32: ``6D1FC798`` (PCSX2 CRC: ``38996035``) - MD5: ``3CBBB5127EE8A0BE93EF0876F7781EE8``
There is rooms for other versions/regions to be added in the future.
# Basic Setup ## AP World Installation 0. Download & install [Archipelago Launcher](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest). 1. Downloaded ``rac2.apworld`` file from the release assets below. 2. Double-click the ``rac2.apworld`` to install it to your local Archipelago's ``custom_worlds`` folder. 3. Restart the Archipelago Launcher 4. Create your player yaml options with the Options Creator in the launcher. 5. Save player yamls to ``Players`` folder or send to person hosting. - Hoster generates multiworld with all player yamls in the ``Players`` folder. - Self host or upload gen from ``output`` to <https://archipelago.gg/uploads>, and share room/connection info. 6. Open ``.aprac2`` with Archipelago or after opening the "Ratchet and Clank 2 Client". - Will be asked for iso, and other ``host.yaml`` options now if not setup. - MAKE SURE THE RAC2 ISO COPIED TO YOUR ARCHIPELGO FOLDER IS FULLY COPIED OR MANUALLY COPY ONE OVER! 7. Should auto connect. Else redownload patch or manually connect with client. (Using slot name, password if set, and IP/URL & port) - Tip. You can connect instantly with: ``<SLOT_NAME>:None@<IP/URL>:<PORT>`` Example: ``CoolPlayer:CoolerPassword@archipelago.gg:38281`` (``None`` works if no password is set) ## PCSX2 Settings - Enable PINE in PCSX2 - In PCSX2, Under Tools, Check Show Advanced Settings - In PCSX2, System -> Settings -> Advanced tab -> PINE Settings, **Check** Enable and ensure Slot is set to ``28011``

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * docs(transport-rando): confirm Itorash capsule exclusion is correct (post-RB escape crash) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/138 * feat(world): add Universal Tracker support by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/139 * Bound the Cataris thermal-toggle gap, per-station /warp, and Nav Station AP hints by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/140 * Un-hide Suitless trick + guard full accessibility for all-tricks-disabled seeds by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/141 * ci(release): fix devkitPro pacman 403 (Cloudflare WAF) in sysmodule build by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/142
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.17.1...v0.18.2

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.5
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.4...v0.6.5

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.35
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed `modify_rule` helper function in plugin system always throwing an error - Added `new_event` and `replace_filler` helper functions to plugin system
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * ci(release): disable tag-push auto-publish (devkitPro WAF blocks hosted runners) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/143 * feat(warp): add nav + map stations as /warp targets by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/144 * feat(warp): persist visited stations in AP DataStorage (survive client restart) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/145 * fix(transport): shuffle no longer silently falls back to vanilla at low trick levels by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/146 * feat(ut): human-readable /explain + /get_logical_path for Universal Tracker by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/147
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.18.1...v0.19.0

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.3
entry.content: ## Change Log - Vena shop fixed if new DLC Custom mode is enabled - Error handling for missing locations

entry.title: Age Of Mythology Retold v1.3.5
entry.content:
### Hotfix Bugfix related to being unable to build Wonders unless in Wonder Age.
### 👍 Fully compatible with current games v1.1+

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.6.0a0
entry.content:
This update catches up to v2.0.0 of the game!
NOTE: If you played client v0.5.0 on v2.0 of the game, you might've gotten challenge board star rating unlocks and/or the 10* rating achievement. If this has happened to you, [the fix is documented here](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/Documentation/Troubleshooting/StarRatingChallengeBug.md)
New songs: - way back when
New characters: - Rest (OMF) - Eve - Grace
DLC (breakout edition) characters: - Crest - Crest (Maid) - DC - Poco - Apoco - Penny - Sforzando
Stages: - playback.
Bug fixes: - Fixed custom songs showing while connected to archipelago - Fixes star rating challenges and achievements unlocking while connected
The **client** is **compatible** with v0.5.0 and v0.4.0 apworlds! You can (and should!) update the mod even if you're currently in an async! The **apworld** is **NOT compatible** with v0.5.0 clients! If you generate a game with the v0.6.0 apworld, you must use the v0.6.0 client mod!
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.5.0
entry.content:
Entrance blocking now enabled!
Also changes: * Tutorial ship console set to sphere 1 required. * Slightly improved file handling. (caught some edge cases) * Improved debug logging (not relevant to anybody else, but included for sake of completeness)
Intended for use with the 0.6.2 BG3 mod.

entry.title: Rusted Moss v0.1.7a0
entry.content:
Changelog:
- Add option to select starting weapon by @Tereneckla - Rework shop discount option to work how the description reads
Info about this randomizer: https://github.com/dgrossmann144/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/rusted_moss/docs/en_Rusted%20Moss.md More extensive and thorough setup documentation can be viewed here: https://github.com/dgrossmann144/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/rusted_moss/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.20.1
entry.content:
## What's Changed * fix(logic): sever false-positive one-way rotatable "flipper" turn edges by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/148 * feat(warp): block /warp in Ghavoran flipper-trap rooms, direct to checkpoint reload by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/149 * Drop unreachable-by-config locations instead of failing full-accessibility gen by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/150 * chore(release): sync apworld manifest version to the tag + automate it by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/151 * fix(patcher): don't invoke the frozen Archipelago launcher as the patcher Python by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/152
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.19.0...v0.20.1

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.7
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Universal Tracker map pages will now auto-tab to the world map whenever you open the Teleport menu in-game. - `vanilla` logic: - "Cortex Center - Caves Middle Left" to "Caves Upper Left" previously had just CL in logic, but that's not quite enough, so now that option is CL + LG. - "Cortex Center - Caves Lower Left" to "Caves Middle Left" now has a TCK-less option: WC + CL + AD - `medium` logic: - "AM - Under First Rope" to "Above Left Exit" now allows nymph and bow hover. - "AF (Depths) - Upper Left Exit" to "Crystal Caves" now allows just CS + Grapple. Previously it allowed CS + Grapple + AD, but it turns out the final drop can be done with yet another CS-dash. - "AF (Depths) - Root Node" to "Shangui Arena" now allows CS + SR + T-dash. - The "AM: Near Root Node" is now reachable from the root node using only a Thunder Buster arrow to break the one-way barrier from the wrong side. This was always the intent, but previously I used too few regions to model this area, which caused it to accidentally require some unrelated platforming too. - "AM - Above Left Exit" to "Root Node" now allows Grapple only, since Swift Runner jumps are good enough for the spike pits after the slider. - "Cortex Center - Caves Lower Left" to "Caves Middle Left" now has TCK-less options: WC + CL + T-dash, or WC + AD + T-dash. - "CTH - Bottom of Large Shaft" to "Yanren Arena" now allows CS-dash and LG in place of AD. - "Factory (MR) - Moving Platforms" was missing a connection to "Root Node". Although this connection is itemless on vanilla logic, we believe it only matters in practice if you can use medium or LS logic to get from "Root Node" to "Behind Turret Near Green Pillar" from the right side, i.e. without using UC to break the turret. - Corrected "Factory (U) - Broken Shanhai (with qi)" to "Middle Right Exit" to explicitly require CS or AD or CL in addition to T-dash, instead of confusingly assuming you must have one of those to reach "Broken Shanhai (with qi)" in the first place. - `ledge_storage` logic: - "Cortex Center - Caves Lower Left" to "Caves Middle Left" now has a WC-less option: CL + LG + TCK lets you triple jump to the TCK targets - "Cortex Center - After Large Door" to "Caves Upper Right" now has a grapple-less option: CL + LG + WC lets you triple jump to the WC surface - "Factory (GH) - Lower Levels & Root Node" to "Above Root Node" can now be done with bow hover and LS vault. - "Factory (MR) - Left Elevator" to "Top of Green Pillar" can now be done with triple jumps. - "GoS (West): Platforms In Top Middle Room" can now be done with bow hover and LS vault. - "IW - Root Node" to "Above Frogs" now allows a wall slide up to the 2nd platform, then an LS vault onto the left crates. - "Yinglong Canal - Farmland Markings" to "Above Egg Cave" now allows wall sliding up the green wall, with AD setup. - Various internal code changes / refactors to prepare for a future update with skill rando.

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.6.1
entry.content: Bug fixes - Resetting does not misfire the `Beat Rival` check - Trainersanity rules for GLC trainers check if a player has the key required, previously was checking how many of the required key they had - E4 access tied to `BadgeRequirement`, previously was defaulting to 8 because of a typo - Added missing EXP values to `growth_rates` dict - Rental randomness fixes - Shuffler fixed - Patching fixed, offset used during writing was not being updated correctly

entry.title: AP Tombola v0.3.0
entry.content:
## New Additions ### **Card Generation Criteria** Option Determines how the Cards will be generated: - **Classic**: The normal Card generation criteria. the following Tombola rules will be followed: - - 1-9 in first column, 10-19 in second column, ..., 80-90 in last column - - All columns will have at least one number - - Numbers in the same column are ordered in ascending order - **Order**: Numbers will be distributed into card in order. - - 1 in Card 1, 2 in Card 2, ..., 6 in Card 6, 7 in Card 1, 8 in Card 2, ... - **Chaos**: Numbers will not respect the Tombola rules respected by the Classic option. - - e.g. 1 may appear in any column, 54 may appear before 22 in a column
### **Marksanity** Option A new Sanity option that creates, for each Number, a location that will require you to Mark that Number to be checked ### **Additional Card Unlocks** Option If Cardsanity and this option are enabled, an additional copy of "Card X Unlock" is created for each locked Card.
### **Location Groups** Locations are now grouped, for easy usage in yaml options such as Priority Locations! Location groups that now exist are: - Card X Locations (for each Card) - Regular Locations - Rowsanity Locations - Regular {score} Locations (for each type of score) - Rowsanity {score} Locations (for each type of score) - All {score} Locations (includes both Regular and Rowsanity locations, for each score) - Milestone Locations - Marksanity Locations - Unlock Locations
### New Filler Items The amount of filler has more than doubled!
## Changes - Spoiler Log now display a player's Cards - Hints in a Tombola location now displays what is needed to obtain it example: `[Hint]: Player2's Pack Rat is at Card 1 - Ambo Reward 1 in Player1's World at Get 2 Numbers in any one of the following rows: [[3, 12, 50, 61, 81], [8, 31, 66, 71, 84], [25, 36, 45, 69, 87]].` - Color of progression items is now lighter in the client's text chat - Client now displays its version in the bottom left of the login screen - When playing the game on **Android**, scroll bars are now 2.5x wider
## Bugfixes - Fixed capitalization being wrong on some filler items - Fixed APWorld being incompatible with APWorlds that modify other slot's Item Rules (such as SBURBelago) - Fixed Unlock Locations not following `Prevent Other Meta Game Items` and being able to contain Progression items from AP Tombola - Fixed Client erroneously making locked cards unlockable when connecting to a 0.2.x slot after logging out of a 0.1.x slot - Fixed Client not showing `(found)` when hinting items already found - Fixed extended hint info not showing when hinting items - Fixed save info behaving incorrectly when deleting a save
## Download and How to Play: - **APWorld** - - The APWorld is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/APWorld-Tombola/releases/tag/0.3
- **Client** - - Client Download for Windows, Linux and Android is available here: https://github.com/Arenes214/AP-Tombola/releases/tag/0.3 - - Client is also available as a website here: https://arenes214.itch.io/ap-tombola - ** Client is backwards compatible with worlds generated on 0.1.x and 0.2.x**

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0
entry.content: - Fixed Decoupled Chaos Entrances not decoupling properly

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0
entry.content: - Made the QoL Return Scepter warp to house only functional after you found your bed

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0
entry.content: - Fixed sleep command with multisleep amount always sleeping one too many days - Fixed Multisleep until Birthday showing up when no birthdays are available - Fixed DR for fish when mods decided to input them with an unqualified ID - Fixed the ability to sell We Moo Unseen cows - Fixed Qi Gem shop having a bunch of issues with randomized currencies

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0
entry.content: - Fixed a small issue with duplicate ice cream entries (?) - Made secrets on the calendar be dynamic with their associated festivals, if applicable - Prevent invisible cows from giving farming XP

entry.title: Castlevania - Aria of Sorrow v2026.7.2
entry.content:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.
Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.
## Canada Day / Fourth of July Update ### Additions: * Adds a Library-to-Forbidden-Area Button Handling option. This turns the button that unlocks the Forbidden Area from the Library into a shuffleable pickup. * Adds friendly names to the checks (c/o @schwartzgandhi for writing and @fenrir7732 for review). * Adds "Oops, All Whips" and "Classicvania Movement" patch options from @Xanthus1 ### Adjustments * Adjusts the ceiling/floor-breaking pickups to be `progression_deprioritized_skip_balancing` instead of `progression_skip_balancing` * Quadruples the drop-rates of Devil, Manticore, and Curly souls * Enables kicking out of single jump (courtesy of Xanthus) ### Fixes * Fixes the build issue reported by Fenrir * Fixes the 814->80D logic error reported by Cringe
